# Progress Dashboard

This page tracks study progress and notes-writing progress across the main study tracks.

::: {.callout-tip}
## How to interpret this table

- **Study percent** tracks conceptual/course progress.
- **Notes percent** tracks how much has been written into these technical notes.
- The dashboard is mainly for internal tracking.
:::

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false

import pandas as pd

df = pd.read_csv("data/progress.csv")

df.style.format({
    "study_percent": "{:.0f}%",
    "notes_percent": "{:.0f}%"
})
```
